query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(aguardando_28d) as com_28d,
  COUNT(aguardando_60d) as com_60d,
  COUNT(aguardando_90d) as com_90d
FROM regulacao_data;

SELECT agenda, municipio, central, aguardando, aguardando_28d, aguardando_60d, aguardando_90d 
FROM regulacao_data 
WHERE aguardando_28d IS NOT NULL 
LIMIT 5;
